vs_airoc_strengths: Unbeatable price point (<$1 in volume) — default choice for cost-driven IoT

Fastest time-to-market for new IoT designs with huge online community
vs_airoc_weaknesses: BLE TX power/sensitivity inferior to Nordic and AIROC at >30m range

Software quality less consistent than Infineon ModusToolbox
Security features less comprehensive (no PSA Level 3 equivalent)
